candidates.text:
In the defense of the unnamed bank, His Holiness is, under U.S. law, ~certainly a politically exposed person (PEP) as a head of state, and therefore a wide range of routine things need enhanced due diligence.

Also, possible the banker's UI did not anticipate that would happen. h
I'm at the Claude w/ Code event in San Francisco, and I'll be live blogging the keynote here https://t.co/6U1Amd2XSZ

I'll be at Code with Claude all day today so come find me and let's chat about Claude!

I'll also be giving a talk on the main stage at 530pm PT so tune in, it will be on the livestream! https://t.co/yhoNEjhsKp

I talk to a lot of people who consider themselves very risk averse

- They keep large amounts of cash
- They rush to pay off low interest debt
- They avoid investing because they are afraid of market volatility

Yet when we actually look at their financial life, they are exposed
